items.caption: A diagram illustrating a laboratory balance with two materials, a and b, each weighing 20 grams. the materials are placed on the balance, and the diagram shows the density of material a to be greater than that of material b. the density of material a is marked with a purple circle, indicating it is the denser of the two. the diagram also shows the phase and shape of the materials, with material a being a solid and material b being a liquid. the background is plain white, emphasizing the balance and the materials.
